item.description:
## Highlights
- rebuilt the main browser around a MachOKit-backed tree with grouped summaries, lazy loading, copy/export actions, and richer `Detail` / `Data` views - added archive-aware parsing, summary, contamination check, merge, and split workflows in both the GUI and `machoe-cli` - expanded tool windows for Retag and XCFramework packaging, including drag and drop, cancellation, adaptive styling, and native-toolchain packaging helpers - improved preferences, localization refresh, update strategy handling, and recent-file reopening for security-scoped bookmarks - adopted a CocoaPods workspace for Debug-only `ViewScopeServer` integration and updated release scripts to package from the workspace

## Highlights
- Rebuilt the main workspace around MachOKit with a MachO-Explorer-style tree browser, grouped summaries, lazy expansion, search, RAW/RVA switching, and richer Detail/Data panels. - Added dedicated `Retag` and `Build XCFramework` tools windows, improved Preferences behavior and localization refresh, fixed CLI install handling, refined light appearance, and added Help navigation to GitHub. - Restored recent-file reopening across relaunches with security-scoped bookmarks, refreshed the README to reflect the current product, and bundled updated screenshots for the new UI.
## Verification
- `xcodebuild test -project MachOKnife.xcodeproj -scheme MachOKnife -configuration Debug -derivedDataPath /tmp/MachOKnifeReleaseVerify -destination 'platform=macOS,arch=x86_64'` - `bash Scripts/build_dmg.sh`
